input: user-item interaction graphs from multiple public domains and a knowledge graph connecting items across domains
output: recommendations for a target domain with no collaborative behaviors
backbone: transferable interest extractor (GCN with layer-wise separation)
loss: BPR loss (implied by collaborative filtering objective)
key_idea: propagate collaborative signals from public domains to a zero-shot target domain via a shared interest graph, discarding bottom GCN layers for user interest to enable transfer
